fluxer 0.6.1

    Reference

    All functions

    agsi_gas_data()

    Count unique values in a column of a data.table

    Retrieve and Process ENTSO-E Actual Generation Data

    List of Mapped Countries for DAM Prices

    Retrieve Actual Generation by Production Type for a Specific Country

    List Files within a Specified Folder on ENTSO-E SFTP Server

    List Top-Level Folder Links from ENTSO-E SFTP Server
